isolation.note: App already running with services started

steps.observed: User created and redirected to home

steps.action: On home page, inspect profile-name element

evidence.network: No API call needed - client-side navigation

steps.action: Click 'Begin meditation session' button from home
steps.expected: Session starts immediately with Marcus greeting, not just navigation to idle session page
steps.observed: Session active immediately - Marcus greeting visible: 'I'm Marcus. Hey there, homeflow_validator_test. What's on your mind?'

steps.action: Verify session is in active state (not idle)
steps.expected: Active session UI with End Session button
steps.observed: End meditation session button visible, textbox for typing shown

assertions.title: Bio is displayed on home page if present

steps.action: Edit profile and add bio text
steps.observed: Bio 'This is my test bio for home page display.' saved successfully
Bio visible on home page with text 'This is my test bio for home page display.'

elementData.profileBioText: This is my test bio for home page display.

frictions.description: Initial localStorage set approach didn't persist auth token between commands - workaround was to use JavaScript eval to set token directly
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval --stdin with localStorage.setItem to properly set the auth token

frictions.description: End Session button required before beginning a new session test - session persisted in browser state
frictions.resolution: Clicked 'End meditation session' before testing new session starts

summary: Tested 4 assertions for home-flows: all 4 passed. VAL-HOME-001: Personalized greeting shows correctly. VAL-HOME-002: Begin Meditation button navigates to /session. VAL-HOME-003: Session starts directly with Marcus greeting (not idle state). VAL-HOME-004: Bio displayed on home page when present.
